description: Write a standards-based publication protocol that describes the pipeline, ontology strategy, rules-as-code bridge, datasets, analyses, quality gates, artefacts, and limitations.
oracle_notes: Track 34 is complete as an evidence-bound publication protocol. It adds a protocol document, claim-to-evidence map, reproducibility instructions, artifact inventory, limitations policy, overclaim guardrails, and tests that keep publication claims tied to repository evidence, planned work, or explicit blockers.
